episodes.title: My Time with the Bentinho Massaro cult
episodes.description:
I recorded this video 3 times, trying to say everything I wanted, and I realized that it's just not possible in an hour long video. What I've shared felt like the important points, but it's by no means exhaustive of my 4-5 years within this group. My intention is exposing Bentinho and also supporting those who may still be entangled with this community, and also having the backs of everyone who has already come out. 

Please watch Mark Vicente's episodes with Jacqueline, Keilan and Jade to get a full picture of the atrocities and abuse of Bentinho Massaro. https://www.youtube.com/@markvicente7/videos. 

You can always reach out to me at tarah@tarahlong.com or through my website www.youaresimplyfree.com.
